title: A Head and Neck Cancer Patient-Specific Microphysiological System for Predicting Response to Chemoradiation.
publicationName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
journalName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
snippet: Head and neck cancer (HNC) is the 6th most common malignancy worldwide. 60% of patients present with advanced disease and approximately 50% of patients recur following primary treatment. Chemoradiation remains a standard of care for most patients. However, clinicians lack functional tools to predict which patients will respond to chemoradiation prior to tre...
